title: McAlester Regional Health Center ransomware incident

extortion.description: Founded in 1978, McAlester Regional Health Center is devoted to a continuum of care offering a variety of health care services to the citizens of Southeast Oklahoma. Another one medical center doesn't care about their patients' data. 126gb of this organization data includes medical information, personal documents, financial and accounting data and lots of HR documentation. 40gb of DNA tests of patients is  a bonus! Stay tuned.
